items.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
items.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
items.author: codecrafters-io
items.summary_zh: 这个项目汇集了大量手把手教程，教你从零开始重建像数据库、Git、Docker这样的经典技术。通过亲手实现底层逻辑，你能够深刻理解它们的工作原理，而不仅仅是使用API。对于想突破表面知识、真正掌握编程核心的开发者来说，这是一座宝贵的实践桥梁。
items.summary_en: Build Your Own X is a collection of step-by-step tutorials that guide you through recreating popular technologies like databases, Git, and Docker from scratch. By building these tools yourself, you gain a deep understanding of how they work under the hood. It's an invaluable resource for developers who want to move beyond using APIs and truly master the fundamentals of programming through hands-on practice.

items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
items.author: OpenCut-app
items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源的视频编辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的替代品。它完全免费，支持多平台使用，用户无需付费即可获得强大的剪辑功能。对于想要摆脱商业软件限制的创作者来说，OpenCut 提供了极高的可定制性和透明度，让视频编辑更加自由。
items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor designed as a free alternative to CapCut. It offers powerful editing features without any subscription or watermark, making it ideal for content creators who want full control over their tools. The project is cross-platform and community-driven, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement. For anyone tired of paid video editors or restrictive platforms, OpenCut provides a flexible and privacy-respecting solution.

items.title: ocornut/imgui
items.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies
items.author: ocornut
items.summary_zh: Dear ImGui是一个极简主义的C++图形用户界面库，几乎没有外部依赖，却能实现流畅的即时模式界面。它特别适合游戏开发工具、调试面板和实时数据可视化场景，因为开发者不需要复杂的UI框架就能快速构建交互界面。相比传统UI库，它更注重开发效率和灵活性，因此在独立游戏和工具链中广受欢迎。
items.summary_en: Dear ImGui is a bloat-free graphical user interface library for C++ with minimal dependencies, offering a seamless immediate mode GUI experience. It is especially popular among game developers and tool builders who need quick, interactive panels for debugging or real-time data visualization without the overhead of traditional UI frameworks. Its focus on simplicity and performance makes it a go-to choice for indie games and embedded tools.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.title: usestrix/strix
items.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
items.author: usestrix
items.summary_zh: Strix是一款开源的AI渗透测试工具，能够自动扫描并修复应用中的安全漏洞。它利用人工智能模拟攻击行为，帮助开发者在早期发现潜在风险，大幅提升安全检测效率。对于缺乏专业安全团队的初创公司和个人开发者来说，Strix提供了一种低成本、高效率的防护方案，让应用安全不再成为短板。
items.summary_en: Strix is an open-source AI-powered penetration testing tool designed to automatically identify and fix vulnerabilities in applications. By simulating cyber attacks with artificial intelligence, it helps developers catch security flaws early in the development cycle, significantly reducing manual effort and cost. This tool is particularly valuable for startups and individual developers who lack dedicated security teams, offering a practical way to strengthen app security without complex infrastructure. Its open-source nature also allows the community to contribute and customize it for specific needs.

items.title: 打败Fable 5！Kimi K3冲上第一，杨植麟导师很骄傲
items.summary_zh: Kimi K3模型在最新评测中一举超越Fable 5，登顶排行榜首位，引发行业关注。月之暗面创始人杨植麟的导师对此表示骄傲，认为这标志着中国AI团队的创新能力正在快速崛起。Kimi K3凭借更强的推理能力和更低的成本，成为开发者首选。
items.summary_en: Kimi K3 has overtaken Fable 5 to claim the top spot in a recent benchmark, marking a significant milestone for Moonshot AI. The model's superior reasoning and cost-efficiency have drawn praise from industry observers, including founder Yang Zhilin's mentor. This achievement highlights the rapid progress of Chinese AI teams in delivering competitive solutions.

items.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
items.author: calesthio
items.summary_zh: OpenMontage 是首个开源智能体视频制作系统，拥有 12 条流水线、52 个工具和 500 多种智能体技能，可以把你的 AI 编程助手变成一个完整的视频制作团队。它解决了传统视频制作流程复杂、门槛高的问题，通过智能体自动完成脚本、剪辑、配音、特效等任务，让任何人都能快速生成专业视频。对内容创作者、营销人员和开发者来说，这意味着不需要专业设备或团队，只用自然语言描述就能产出高质量视频，极大降低了视频制作的门槛和成本。
items.summary_en: OpenMontage is the world's first open-source, agentic video production system, featuring 12 pipelines, 52 tools, and over 500 agent skills. It transforms your AI coding assistant into a full-fledged video production studio, automating tasks like scriptwriting, editing, voiceover, and effects. This solves the complexity and high cost of traditional video creation, enabling anyone to produce professional videos using natural language commands. Content creators, marketers, and developers benefit from a streamlined workflow that eliminates the need for specialized hardware or teams. It's a game-changer for democratizing video production, making it as simple as talking to an AI.

items.title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
items.author: rohitg00
items.summary_zh: 这是一个面向AI工程师的入门级开源项目，从零开始教授机器学习工程的核心技能。作者强调学以致用，不仅构建模型，还要学会部署和交付给他人使用。适合希望系统掌握AI工程全流程的初学者和转行者。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository offers a hands-on curriculum for aspiring AI engineers, covering everything from foundations to deployment. The motto 'Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others' reflects its practical approach: you don't just study theory, you create real products. Perfect for beginners or career switchers who want a structured path into AI engineering.

items.title: PostHog/posthog
items.description: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.
items.author: PostHog
items.summary_zh: PostHog是一个开源的产品分析平台，帮助团队构建“自动驾驶”产品。它集成了AI可观测性、用户行为分析、会话回放和功能开关等工具，让开发者无需依赖多个第三方服务。非常适合注重数据隐私和自建分析能力的团队。
items.summary_en: PostHog is an open-source product analytics suite that empowers teams to build self-driving products. It combines AI observability, session replay, feature flags, and more into one platform, reducing reliance on multiple vendors. With full control over data, it's ideal for startups and enterprises that prioritize privacy and flexibility.

items.title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
items.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
items.author: DeusData
items.summary_zh: 这是一个高性能的代码智能MCP服务器，能将整个代码库索引成持久化的知识图谱，支持158种语言，平均查询响应时间仅为毫秒级。它极大地提升了开发者在大型项目中快速理解代码结构的能力，尤其适合复杂代码库的维护和重构场景。
items.summary_en: This MCP server indexes entire codebases into a persistent knowledge graph with sub-millisecond latency, supporting 158 languages. It enables developers to rapidly understand code structure, dependencies, and history — a game-changer for navigating large, legacy, or unfamiliar repositories. Perfect for teams doing code reviews, refactoring, or onboarding.

items.title: 刚刚，Fable 5官宣永久可用
items.summary_zh: Fable 5今日正式宣布永久免费开放所有功能，用户无需再担心订阅到期或功能限制。这一决定被认为是对用户反馈的积极回应，也意在巩固其在开发者社区中的口碑。对于依赖Fable 5进行日常编码和调试的团队来说，这无疑是个好消息。
items.summary_en: Fable 5 has just announced it will be permanently free, lifting all subscription restrictions. The move is seen as a response to community feedback and a strategy to strengthen its developer ecosystem. Teams using Fable 5 for coding and debugging can now rely on it without cost worries, making it a more attractive alternative in the tooling space.

items.title: 门票炒到 3000 元的 WAIC，我们找到了 AI 真正的创新
items.summary_zh: 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）一票难求，门票甚至被炒到3000元，但我们在喧嚣之外找到了真正值得关注的AI创新。这些创新并非宏大叙事，而是聚焦于落地场景、提升效率的小而美解决方案，比如在医疗、制造等领域默默改变行业运转方式的项目。它们才是AI未来的基石。
items.summary_en: Tickets for the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) have been scalped up to 3000 yuan, but beyond the hype, we found the real AI innovations—not grandiose promises but practical, smaller-scale solutions that improve efficiency in fields like healthcare and manufacturing. These are the quiet game-changers that will define AI's true impact.

items.title: “韩国最好的夏天”：120万人爆仓，巨亏940万亿
items.summary_zh: 韩国经历了一个“最好的夏天”，却伴随着120万投资者爆仓、总亏损高达940万亿韩元的惨痛代价。这起事件源于对高风险金融产品的狂热追逐，最终演变成一场大规模财富蒸发。它再次警示人们，泡沫狂欢的背后往往是深渊，理性投资才是生存之道。
items.summary_en: South Korea experienced what was ironically called 'the best summer' as 1.2 million investors saw their positions liquidated, suffering total losses of 940 trillion won. This mass blow-up stemmed from a frenzy over high-risk financial products, turning euphoria into a devastating wealth wipeout—a stark reminder that markets built on hype can collapse overnight.

items.title: 真正让人变通透、有智慧的15个底层习惯
items.summary_zh: 真正让人变得通透而有智慧的，不是天赋或运气，而是15个深植于日常的底层习惯。比如保持好奇、延迟判断、记录反思、主动休息等。这些习惯看似简单，却能从根本上重塑思维模式和生活品质。任何渴望成长的人都能从中受益，逐步活出更清醒、从容的人生。
items.summary_en: Real wisdom and clarity come not from talent or luck but from 15 foundational habits rooted in daily life—like staying curious, withholding judgment, journaling reflections, and taking proactive breaks. These simple yet transformative practices reshape your thinking and quality of life, helping anyone who craves growth become more clear-headed and resilient.

items.title: 从不发朋友圈、不更新社交动态的人，是什么心理？
items.summary_zh: 那些从不发朋友圈、不更新社交动态的人，往往并非孤僻或冷漠，而是出于一种清醒的自我选择。他们可能更注重隐私保护、渴望真实的人际联结，或者不愿将生活碎片化地展示给他人。这种行为背后是对社交媒体的深度反思，以及对内心秩序和专注力的主动维护。
items.summary_en: People who never post on social media or update their status aren't necessarily antisocial or aloof. Instead, they often make a conscious choice to protect privacy, seek authentic connections, or avoid fragmenting their lives for public display. This behavior reflects a deep reflection on social media's impact and a proactive effort to preserve inner peace and focus.

items.title: 40元的网红蛋糕，一年关店180家
items.summary_zh: 曾靠40元高性价比红极一时的网红蛋糕品牌，如今一年内关闭了180家门店。从排队热潮到大规模关店，折射出网红餐饮的残酷真相：低价流量难以持续，供应链管控、品牌老化、消费者尝鲜心理消退等致命伤集中爆发。如果没能构建真正的壁垒，网红品牌终成过眼云烟。
items.summary_en: A once-popular cake brand known for its 40-yuan price tag and long queues has shut down 180 stores in just one year. Its fall from viral hit to mass closure reveals the harsh reality of internet-famous food businesses: low-price hype is unsustainable, and issues like supply chain fragility, brand fatigue, and fickle consumer tastes eventually catch up. Without a real moat, even the hottest brands fade fast.

items.title: WAIC2026的三个关键信号：算力重组、Agent交付与AI硬件闭环
items.summary_zh: WAIC 2026大会上释放了三个关键信号：算力正在从堆规模转向精准重组，AI Agent从演示走向真正可交付的产品，以及AI硬件终于形成从芯片到终端的闭环生态。这三个趋势意味着行业不再盲目追求参数膨胀，而是关注实际落地和可持续运行，对开发者和企业选型有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: WAIC 2026 sent three key signals: computing power is shifting from brute-force scaling to intelligent reorganization, AI agents are moving from demos to real-world deployable products, and AI hardware is finally forming a closed loop from chips to end devices. These trends show the industry is maturing beyond parameter inflation, focusing on practical deployment and sustainability—critical clues for developers and enterprises planning their AI strategies.

items.title: 中产最爱的果汁，里面连水果都没有？
items.summary_zh: 一篇调查揭露了市场上许多标称“鲜榨”或“纯果汁”的产品其实不含任何真实水果成分，而是用香精、色素和糖浆调配而成。这类“假果汁”价格不菲却深受中产消费者青睐，背后暴露了食品标签监管漏洞和消费者对健康饮品的认知盲区。
items.summary_en: An investigation reveals that many popular 'fresh-squeezed' or 'pure fruit' juices actually contain no real fruit at all—they are made from flavorings, colorings, and syrups. These fake juices command premium prices and are favored by middle-class consumers, exposing gaps in food labeling regulations and widespread misconceptions about healthy beverages. The story serves as a cautionary tale for anyone seeking genuine nutrition in bottled drinks.

items.title: 从GPU到Token：英伟达Vera Rubin如何重构下一代AI工厂
items.summary_zh: 英伟达下一代架构Vera Rubin被视为AI工厂的核心引擎，它不再仅仅关注GPU算力，而是将重心转向Token——即AI模型处理的基本单元。通过优化从计算到内存的整个链路，Vera Rubin旨在降低大规模模型训练和推理的成本与延迟。这对需要部署大模型的企业意义重大，意味着更高效的AI基础设施和更低的运营门槛。
items.summary_en: NVIDIA's upcoming Vera Rubin architecture reimagines AI factories by shifting focus from raw GPU power to tokens, the fundamental units AI models process. It optimizes the entire compute-memory pipeline to reduce costs and latency for training and inference at scale. This matters for enterprises building large language models, as it promises more efficient hardware that lowers the barrier to deploying advanced AI systems, potentially reshaping the economics of AI infrastructure.

items.title: 未来的软件如何摆脱平台绑定？答案可能藏在数据格式里
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨了软件行业长期存在的平台锁定问题，并提出解决方案可能在于数据格式的开放与标准化。通过采用可移植、互操作的数据格式，用户和开发者可以自由迁移数据和应用，不再被单一厂商束缚。这一思路对降低企业技术风险、促进生态竞争具有重要意义，尤其适合那些希望保持技术独立性的开发团队和业务决策者。
items.summary_en: This article tackles the persistent problem of platform lock-in in software and suggests that open, standardized data formats could be the key to liberation. By designing systems with portable and interoperable data structures, users and developers can migrate workloads between platforms freely, reducing vendor dependency. The insight is crucial for businesses seeking technical autonomy and for developers building resilient software, as it shifts power back to the community and fosters healthier competition.

items.title: 从工具到引擎：AI重构分销增长新范式｜AICon深圳
items.summary_zh: 本文报道了AICon深圳大会上关于AI如何重塑分销增长的主题。过去AI只是辅助工具，现在它正演变为驱动分销策略的核心引擎，能够实时分析市场数据、预测客户行为并自动优化推广路径。这种转变让企业从被动应对变为主动增长，尤其对电商、SaaS和数字营销领域的从业者具有直接指导价值，展现了AI从增效工具到增长发动机的角色跃升。
items.summary_en: Reporting from AICon Shenzhen, this article describes how AI is evolving from a supporting tool to the central engine driving distribution growth. By analyzing market data in real time, predicting customer behavior, and automating campaign optimization, AI now powers proactive growth strategies rather than just incremental improvements. This paradigm shift is particularly relevant for e-commerce, SaaS, and digital marketing professionals, as it demonstrates how AI transforms distribution from a cost center into a value-creating engine.

items.title: Stripe 发布基准测试：AI 智能体可开发集成方案，但校验环节存在短板
items.summary_zh: Stripe 最近发布了一项关于 AI 智能体开发支付集成方案的基准测试，结果令人既兴奋又警醒。测试显示，当前 AI 智能体能够快速生成功能完整的集成方案，大幅缩短了开发时间，这对于小型团队或初创公司来说是个福音。然而，AI 在方案校验环节表现明显不足，容易遗漏关键的安全验证和边界情况，导致生成的代码在生产环境中可能埋下隐患。Stripe 强调，AI 智能体应当作为加速工具而非替代人类审核，开发者需要建立严格的验证流程来弥补 AI 的短板。
items.summary_en: Stripe recently released a benchmark evaluating AI agents for building payment integration solutions. The findings are both promising and cautionary: AI agents can rapidly produce functional integration code, dramatically accelerating development speed—a huge win for small teams and startups. However, the agents consistently fell short in the validation phase, often missing critical security checks and edge cases, potentially introducing production risks. Stripe underscores that AI should be used as an accelerator, not a replacement for human review, and developers must enforce rigorous verification processes to compensate for these gaps.

items.title: SwiftData 迎来大升级：查询能力增强，支持第三方类型持久化
items.summary_zh: 苹果的持久化框架 SwiftData 近期迎来一次重大升级，核心亮点在于查询能力的显著增强，现在开发者可以执行更复杂的筛选和排序操作。更令人兴奋的是，它开始支持第三方数据类型的持久化存储，这意味着开发者不再受限于苹果原生类型，可以更灵活地将来自外部库或自定义模型的数据直接存入数据库。这一改动极大地降低了与外部数据格式集成的门槛，对于构建数据密集型的 iOS 和 macOS 应用来说是一次效率革命，尤其适合需要混合使用多种数据源的团队。
items.summary_en: Apple's SwiftData framework has received a major upgrade, with enhanced query capabilities that allow developers to perform more complex filtering and sorting. More importantly, it now supports persistence for third-party data types, breaking free from exclusive reliance on native Apple types. This means developers can directly store custom models or data from external libraries into the database without cumbersome conversions. The change significantly reduces integration friction for data-intensive iOS and macOS apps, making SwiftData a more versatile and practical choice for teams that need to mix multiple data sources, ultimately streamlining development workflows.

items.title: 搭载全球首个智能体原生操作系统 Step AOS，STEPX Neo 亮相 2026 WAIC
items.summary_zh: STEPX在WAIC 2026上发布了Neo智能硬件，搭载全球首个智能体原生操作系统Step AOS。该系统专门为AI Agent设计，能够直接管理多Agent协作、任务调度和资源分配，让硬件不再只是运行单个模型的工具，而是成为自主智能体集群的宿主平台。这对开发复杂AI应用场景的团队来说是一个重要的基础设施选项。
items.summary_en: At WAIC 2026, STEPX unveiled the Neo smart device powered by Step AOS, the world's first agent-native operating system. Built specifically for AI agents, Step AOS handles multi-agent collaboration, task scheduling, and resource allocation directly, transforming hardware from a model runner into a host platform for autonomous agent swarms. This gives developers a new infrastructure foundation for building complex agent-based applications that require coordination and real-time adaptation.

items.title: WAIC 2026 | 混元Hy3大模型首秀，腾讯上线AI技能支付体系
items.summary_zh: 腾讯在WAIC 2026上首次公开展示了混元Hy3大模型，同时在现场宣布上线AI技能支付体系。Hy3被认为是混元系列的重大升级，在推理和多模态能力上有显著突破。而AI技能支付体系则允许用户按次或按量购买特定AI技能（如图像生成、代码辅助），这种灵活的付费模式可能改变AI服务商业化的方式。
items.summary_en: At WAIC 2026, Tencent publicly debuted its Hunyuan Hy3 large language model, claiming major leaps in reasoning and multimodal capabilities. Alongside the model launch, Tencent introduced an AI skills payment system that lets users purchase specific AI abilities—like image generation or code assistance—on a per-use or volume basis. This flexible monetization model could reshape how AI services are consumed and billed, moving away from blanket subscriptions toward granular value exchange.

items.title: 亚马逊云科技推出 Claude 应用网关：面向 Claude Code 与 Claude Desktop 的自托管控制平面
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊云科技发布了Claude应用网关，这是一个面向Claude Code和Claude Desktop的自托管控制平面。它允许企业将Claude的访问完全托管在自己的基础设施内，实现数据不出域的同时灵活管理使用权限、流量监控和成本控制。对于对安全合规有严格要求的企业来说，这个网关解决了将Claude部署到敏感环境的核心痛点。
items.summary_en: AWS launched the Claude Application Gateway, a self-hosted control plane for Claude Code and Claude Desktop. It lets enterprises manage all access to Claude within their own infrastructure, ensuring data never leaves their environment while offering granular control over permissions, traffic monitoring, and cost management. For companies with strict compliance and security requirements, this gateway solves the core pain point of deploying powerful AI assistants like Claude in sensitive or regulated settings.

items.title: GOAI 世界人工智能开源大赛官网上线，全球报名正式开启
items.summary_zh: GOAI世界人工智能开源大赛官网正式上线并开启全球报名，这是一场围绕开源人工智能技术的国际竞赛，旨在汇聚全球开发者共同解决实际场景中的AI难题。大赛提供海量数据集和算力资源，鼓励创新并推动开源生态发展，尤其适合希望用技术改变世界的机器学习工程师和科研人员参与。
items.summary_en: The GOAI World AI Open Source Competition has officially launched its website and opened global registration. This international contest focuses on open-source AI technologies, aiming to bring together developers worldwide to tackle real-world AI challenges. It provides massive datasets and computing power, encouraging innovation and fostering the open-source ecosystem. It is ideal for machine learning engineers and researchers who want to make an impact through technology.

items.title: AI从“能对话”走向“能办事”，蚂蚁集团WAIC展示三层布局
items.summary_zh: 蚂蚁集团在WAIC大会上展示了AI从对话式交互向实际任务执行演进的进程，并提出了包括基座模型、智能应用和行业解决方案的三层布局策略。这意味着AI不再只是聊天工具，而是能够真正处理支付、风控、客服等复杂业务，为金融机构和中小企业提供高效、可信的智能服务，推动产业数字化升级。
items.summary_en: At WAIC, Ant Group demonstrated how AI is evolving from conversational interactions to executing real tasks, unveiling a three-tier layout covering foundation models, smart applications, and industry solutions. This shift means AI is no longer just a chat tool but can handle complex business operations like payments, risk control, and customer service. It offers efficient, trustworthy intelligent services for financial institutions and SMEs, driving digital transformation across industries.

items.title: 万亿Token调用量验证，PPIO如何打造新一代智能Token工厂？
items.summary_zh: PPIO凭借万亿Token调用量的验证经验，打造了新一代智能Token工厂，专注于为AI模型训练和推理提供高效、低成本的Token处理服务。它解决了大规模Token生成与管理的性能瓶颈，尤其适合需要处理海量自然语言数据的开发团队和AI公司，帮助它们降低训练成本并加速产品迭代。
items.summary_en: Backed by the validation of trillions of token invocations, PPIO has built a new-generation intelligent token factory that focuses on providing efficient and low-cost token processing for AI model training and inference. It solves performance bottlenecks in massive token generation and management, especially beneficial for development teams and AI companies dealing with huge volumes of natural language data. This helps reduce training costs and accelerate product iteration.

items.title: Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence
items.author: vincent_s
items.summary_zh: Kimi K3 是一款开源前沿智能模型，旨在将最先进的AI能力开放给更多开发者和研究者。它解决了闭源AI技术垄断的问题，让社区能够自由实验、定制和改进模型。无论是初创公司还是学术机构，都能借助Kimi K3构建自己的智能应用，而无需支付昂贵的授权费用。这种开放策略有望加速AI创新和民主化，使得更广泛的人群能享受到人工智能的成果。
items.summary_en: Kimi K3 is an open-source frontier intelligence model designed to democratize state-of-the-art AI capabilities. It tackles the problem of closed-source AI monopolies by allowing developers and researchers to freely experiment, customize, and improve the model. Startups and academic institutions, in particular, can build their own intelligent applications without expensive licensing fees. This open approach is expected to accelerate AI innovation and democratization, making advanced artificial intelligence accessible to a broader audience.

items.title: AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion
items.author: nprateem
items.summary_zh: AWS 近日承认其估算计费数据出现严重不准确，误差金额高达 17 亿美元。这一数字令人震惊，意味着某些客户可能收到了严重偏离实际使用量的账单预估，从而影响预算决策与资源配置。虽然 AWS 强调最终结算会基于准确数据，但如此巨大的估算偏差动摇了用户对云成本管理工具的信任。对于严重依赖 AWS 的企业来说，这一事件凸显了依赖自动化计费预估的风险，也引发了业界对云服务商提供更透明、更精准计费信息的迫切需求。
items.summary_en: AWS has admitted to a massive inaccuracy in its estimated billing data, with errors reaching a staggering $1.7 billion. This means many customers may have received wildly incorrect billing estimates, affecting their budget planning and resource allocation decisions. While AWS assures that final charges will be based on precise data, such a large discrepancy undermines trust in cloud cost management tools. For enterprises heavily reliant on AWS, this event highlights the risks of depending solely on automated billing estimates and underscores the urgent need for cloud providers to deliver more transparent and accurate billing information.

items.title: Inkling: Our Open-Weights Model
items.author: vimarsh6739
items.summary_zh: Inkling是一个新发布的开放权重AI模型，其核心特点是完全公开模型参数，允许开发者自由下载、微调和部署。与许多只提供API的闭源模型不同，Inkling旨在打破黑箱，让研究者能深入理解模型行为，企业能基于私有数据定制专属版本而不受供应商限制。它特别适合那些对数据隐私敏感或需要高度可定制AI能力的团队。开放权重模式也推动了AI民主化的讨论，让更多人能直接使用和改造先进模型，而不只是充当被动用户。
items.summary_en: Inkling is a newly released open-weights AI model that makes its parameters fully available for download, fine-tuning, and deployment. Unlike many closed-source models that only offer APIs, Inkling breaks the black box: researchers can scrutinize its behavior, and enterprises can customize it on private data without vendor lock-in. This is especially valuable for teams with strict data privacy needs or those requiring highly tailored AI capabilities. By embracing the open-weights philosophy, Inkling contributes to the democratization of AI, empowering more people to directly use and adapt advanced models rather than merely consuming them through restricted interfaces.

items.title: LG monitors silently install software through Windows Update without consent
items.author: baranul
items.summary_zh: 有用户发现LG显示器通过Windows Update悄悄安装未经用户同意的软件，引发了关于隐私和用户自主权的争议。这一行为不仅影响了系统性能，还暴露了硬件厂商利用系统更新渠道强行推送软件的隐患，对注重隐私和系统纯净度的技术用户尤为困扰。
items.summary_en: Users discovered that LG monitors silently install software through Windows Update without user consent, sparking controversy over privacy and user autonomy. This behavior not only affects system performance but also exposes the risk of hardware vendors using system update channels to force software installations. It is particularly troubling for tech-savvy users who value privacy and a clean system environment.

items.title: Jurassic Park computers in excruciating detail
items.author: vinhnx
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章以令人惊叹的细节剖析了《侏罗纪公园》电影中出现的所有计算机——从公园控制中心的SGI图形工作站到程序员使用的Macintosh，再到那些经典的恐龙追踪界面。它不只是一次怀旧之旅，更揭示了90年代计算机图形界面、系统架构和电影特效技术的真实面貌。对于科幻电影迷和复古计算机爱好者来说，这是一次硬核的考古之旅，能让你重新认识那些看似科幻实际上基于真实硬件和软件的屏幕操作，甚至发现电影中的一些技术彩蛋和创作逻辑。
items.summary_en: This article meticulously dissects every computer featured in the movie Jurassic Park, from the SGI workstations in the control room to the Macs used by programmers, and the iconic dinosaur tracking interfaces. It's more than nostalgia — it reveals the real state of 1990s graphical interfaces, system architectures, and visual effects technology. For sci-fi movie buffs and retro computing enthusiasts, this is a hardcore archaeological dive that shows how those seemingly futuristic screens were actually built on authentic hardware and software of the era. You'll discover technical Easter eggs and appreciate the filmmakers' commitment to believable, functional-looking interfaces.

items.title: The lost joy of music piracy
items.author: mcgin
items.summary_zh: 一篇 Hacker News 上的热门文章怀念起了音乐盗版时代的那种快乐。作者认为，盗版不仅仅是为了免费获取音乐，更是一种发现和分享的社区体验，充满了对音乐的热爱和探索的兴奋。如今流媒体虽然方便，却失去了那种淘碟般的惊喜和收藏的乐趣。这篇文章引发了人们对数字时代消费方式的深思。
items.summary_en: A popular Hacker News post reminisces about the joy of music piracy, arguing it wasn't just about getting music for free but about the community-driven discovery and sharing experience. It was filled with the excitement of exploration and a genuine love for music. While streaming offers convenience, it lacks the thrill of digging for rarities and the pride of curating a personal collection. The article prompts readers to reflect on how we consume media in the digital age and what we've lost along the way.

items.title: Microsoft Comic Chat is now open source
items.author: jervant
items.summary_zh: 微软近日将经典聊天软件 Microsoft Comic Chat 的源代码正式开源，引发了一波怀旧热潮。这款诞生于上世纪 90 年代末的软件，以其独创的漫画风格聊天界面而闻名——用户可以选择角色、表情和动作，对话以连环画形式呈现，在互联网早期可谓标新立异。如今开源，意味着开发者可以研究其代码逻辑，甚至移植到现代平台。对于技术考古爱好者和希望探索早期图形界面社交交互的开发者来说，这是一个不可多得的学习资源。
items.summary_en: Microsoft has officially open-sourced the code for its classic chat software, Microsoft Comic Chat. Released in the late 1990s, it was renowned for its novel comic-style interface: users selected characters, expressions, and actions to turn conversations into a sequential comic strip, a radical concept at the time. Now open source, developers can explore its inner workings and potentially port it to modern platforms. This is a treasure trove for tech archaeology enthusiasts and developers curious about early graphical social interactions, offering a unique glimpse into the creative experimentation of the early internet era.

items.title: Paradigm
items.description: Turn any goal into a personalized, adaptive learning path.
items.summary_zh: Paradigm 是一款能将任何目标转化为个性化自适应学习路径的工具。它利用AI分析用户的知识水平和学习习惯，动态调整学习计划，帮助用户高效达成既定目标。不同于传统的固定课程，Paradigm能够识别用户的薄弱环节并提供针对性内容。对于想要系统学习新技能或准备考试的人来说，它提供了一种灵活且高效的解决方案，极大提升了学习的自主性和效率。
items.summary_en: Paradigm turns any goal into a personalized, adaptive learning path by leveraging AI to analyze a user's knowledge level and learning habits, dynamically adjusting the plan to help them achieve their target efficiently. Unlike fixed curricula, Paradigm identifies weak spots and delivers tailored content. This makes it a flexible and effective solution for anyone wanting to systematically learn a new skill or prepare for exams, significantly boosting autonomy and learning efficiency.

items.title: Thanks HN for 15 years of support and helping me find my life's work
items.author: nicholasjbs
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者发文感谢Hacker News社区15年来的陪伴与支持，称这个平台帮助他找到了毕生的事业。这篇简短而真挚的帖子回顾了自己在HN上学习、交流并最终确定职业方向的历程，突显了技术社区对个人成长的深远影响，也让无数读者感受到社群互助的温暖。
items.summary_en: A developer posted a heartfelt thank-you to the Hacker News community for 15 years of support, crediting the platform with helping him find his life's work. The brief yet sincere post reflects on how he learned, exchanged ideas, and ultimately defined his career path through HN. It highlights the profound impact a tech community can have on personal growth and resonates with many readers who have experienced the warmth of peer support.

items.title: Sleep regularity is a stronger predictor of mortality risk than sleep duration (2023)
items.author: bilsbie
items.summary_zh: 一项2023年的研究发现，睡眠规律性（即每天在同一时间入睡和起床）比睡眠时长更能预测死亡风险。研究团队分析了数万名参与者的数据后发现，即使睡眠时间充足，如果作息不规律，健康风险也会显著增加。这个发现挑战了以往强调“睡够8小时”的常识，提醒我们保持固定的生物钟或许比追求时长更重要——尤其对那些经常倒班或作息混乱的人来说，调整睡眠规律性可能是改善健康、延长寿命的更有效途径。
items.summary_en: A 2023 study reveals that sleep regularity—consistently sleeping and waking at the same times each day—is a stronger predictor of mortality risk than total sleep duration. Analyzing data from tens of thousands of participants, researchers found that irregular sleep patterns, even with adequate sleep hours, significantly increase health risks. This challenges the common emphasis on achieving eight hours of sleep, suggesting that maintaining a stable circadian rhythm may be more critical for longevity. The findings are particularly relevant for shift workers or those with chaotic schedules, offering a simpler target: focus on consistency rather than counting hours.

items.title: Decoy Font
items.author: ray__
items.summary_zh: Decoy Font 是一种专为对抗自动字体识别和 OCR（光学字符识别）系统而设计的特殊字体。它通过对标准字形进行细微但足以迷惑算法的扭曲，使得机器难以准确读取文字内容，同时普通人眼仍能勉强辨认。这种字体在隐私保护领域颇具创意价值，例如用于在公开发布的文档中隐藏敏感信息，或者制作反爬虫验证码。对于关注数据隐私和安全的研究人员来说，Decoy Font 提供了一种低开销的对抗手段，但也可能引发字体的可读性与机器可读性之间的权衡讨论。
items.summary_en: Decoy Font is a specialized typeface designed to thwart automatic font recognition and OCR (optical character recognition) systems. It subtly distorts standard glyphs enough to confuse algorithms while remaining somewhat legible to human eyes. This creative approach has clear privacy applications: it can be used to conceal sensitive information in publicly shared documents or to create captchas that resist automated extraction. For researchers and developers concerned with data privacy and security, Decoy Font offers a low-overhead adversarial tool. However, it also raises interesting debates about the trade-off between human readability and machine readability in an increasingly automated world.

items.title: Unabyss for Claude
items.description: Shared memory across all apps and LLMs. In Claude
items.summary_zh: Unabyss for Claude 是一款让 Claude 拥有跨应用和跨大模型共享记忆的工具。它能记住你在不同软件和 AI 模型间的对话上下文，不再每次重启都要从头解释。对于重度使用 AI 助手、频繁切换工作场景的用户来说，这解决了记忆碎片化的大痛点，让协作更连贯自然。
items.summary_en: Unabyss for Claude is a tool that gives Claude persistent memory across different apps and large language models. It retains conversation context even when you switch between software or AI assistants, eliminating the need to repeat yourself. This solves the fragmentation problem for heavy AI users who juggle multiple tools, making workflows smoother and more coherent.

items.title: ZooData
items.description: The data layer for AI agents
items.summary_zh: ZooData 是一个专门为 AI 智能体打造的数据层平台，它解决了智能体在访问和整合多源数据时遇到的碎片化和权限问题。通过提供统一的接口和实时数据流，ZooData 让 AI 代理能够高效地读取、写入和同步来自不同系统的结构化数据，相当于给智能体装上了“数据神经系统”。对于正在构建复杂 AI 工作流的开发者和企业来说，这个工具能大幅减少数据预处理的工作量，让智能体直接“吃”到干净、实时的数据。
items.summary_en: ZooData is a dedicated data layer built specifically for AI agents, addressing the fragmentation and permission headaches that agents face when accessing data from multiple sources. It offers a unified API with real-time data streaming, enabling AI agents to read, write, and sync structured data seamlessly across different systems. Think of it as giving your agent a nervous system for data. For developers and enterprises building complex AI workflows, ZooData cuts down the heavy lifting of data preprocessing, letting agents consume clean, live data directly. This means faster development cycles and more reliable agent behavior.

items.title: Zro
items.description: Private inference for coding agents
items.summary_zh: Zro 是一个为编码代理提供私有推理服务的工具，专注于保护代码隐私。在AI辅助编程越来越流行的今天，开发者通常需要将代码发送到云端进行推理，这存在泄露敏感商业逻辑的风险。Zro通过安全的私有推理机制，让编码代理在不暴露原始代码的情况下进行智能分析。这对于重视代码安全的企业开发者尤其重要，他们可以在享受AI帮助的同时确保核心竞争力不受威胁。
items.summary_en: Zro provides private inference for coding agents, focusing on protecting code privacy. As AI-assisted programming becomes popular, developers often send code to the cloud for inference, risking exposure of sensitive business logic. Zro uses a secure private inference mechanism that enables coding agents to analyze code without revealing the original source. This is crucial for enterprise developers who value code security, allowing them to benefit from AI assistance while keeping their competitive advantage intact.

items.title: Clark
items.description: An AI coworker with its own cloud computer
items.summary_zh: Clark 是一位拥有自己云端计算机的 AI 同事，它不只是对话机器人，而是一个能独立操作桌面软件、浏览网页、处理文件的智能代理。Clark 可以在云端运行复杂的任务，比如自动整理报表、管理邮件、甚至操作 SaaS 工具，然后直接给你结果。对于需要自动化重复性办公任务的团队来说，Clark 就像一个不会累的数字员工，无需 API 集成就能操控现有软件，大大降低了自动化门槛。
items.summary_en: Clark is an AI coworker equipped with its own cloud computer, moving beyond simple chatbots to become an agent that can independently operate desktop software, browse the web, and manage files. Running entirely in the cloud, Clark handles complex tasks like compiling reports, sorting emails, or using SaaS tools, then returns the finished work to you. For teams drowning in repetitive office chores, Clark acts as a tireless digital employee that can control existing software without needing API integrations. This dramatically lowers the barrier to automation, making it accessible even for non-technical users.

items.title: Kimi K3
items.description: The world's first open 3T-class model
items.summary_zh: Kimi K3 号称全球首个开源 3T 类模型，拥有约 3 万亿参数，规模惊人。它将推动大语言模型的研究和 democratization，让更多团队能以低成本探索超级大模型的能力。虽然训练和部署成本极高，但其开源特性可能会催生新的应用场景和学术突破。
items.summary_en: Kimi K3 claims to be the world's first open-source model in the 3 trillion parameter class, boasting roughly 3 trillion parameters. This massive scale pushes the frontier of large language model research and democratization, allowing more teams to explore super-large models at lower cost. While training and deployment remain extremely expensive, its open-source nature could spur new applications and academic breakthroughs.

items.title: Pebbles Ai
items.description: AI sales platform for modern B2B teams
items.summary_zh: Pebbles Ai 是一个面向现代 B2B 团队的 AI 销售平台，能自动处理线索跟进、客户沟通和数据分析等繁琐任务。它用自然语言理解销售流程，帮助团队把精力集中在高价值谈判上。对于销售效率至上、希望用 AI 减轻行政负担的团队来说，这是一个实用的生产力工具。
items.summary_en: Pebbles Ai is an AI sales platform designed for modern B2B teams. It automates routine tasks like lead follow-ups, customer communication, and data analysis by understanding natural language sales processes. This frees up team members to focus on high-value negotiations. For sales teams looking to boost productivity and reduce administrative overhead, it's a practical AI assistant.

items.title: Albato AI
items.description: Build AI-driven workflows across 1,000+ apps
items.summary_zh: Albato AI 让你无需编程就能在超过 1000 个应用之间构建 AI 驱动的工作流。它整合了各种 SaaS 工具，通过简单的界面设置自动化任务，比如用 ChatGPT 处理邮件或同步数据。对于业务人员和技术用户来说，它降低了搭建智能自动化的门槛，让重复工作真正实现无人值守。
items.summary_en: Albato AI enables no-code AI-driven workflows across more than 1,000 apps. It connects various SaaS tools and allows users to set up automations — like processing emails with ChatGPT or syncing data — through a simple interface. This lowers the barrier for both business users and tech enthusiasts to build smart automation, turning repetitive tasks into truly hands-off operations.

items.title: Codex 穷鬼大救星
items.description: 穷则思变，富则...算了，富哥就不用看这篇文章了！ 为了守护我们钱包，这套穷鬼工作流横空出世！ 欢迎来到 AI 黑心包工队！
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了一套名为“穷鬼工作流”的AI编程方案，旨在帮助预算有限的开发者利用Codex等工具低成本完成项目。作者以幽默自嘲的口吻，将这套方案比作“AI黑心包工队”，强调其核心价值是让手头拮据的程序员也能享受AI带来的效率提升，而不必购买昂贵的付费服务。对于个人开发者和小团队尤其实用。
items.summary_en: This article introduces a budget-friendly AI coding workflow called "Poor Guy Workflow," aimed at helping developers with limited funds leverage tools like Codex to complete projects at low cost. The author humorously dubs it an "AI shady contractor team," emphasizing that it allows coders on a tight budget to enjoy AI efficiency boosts without expensive subscriptions. It's especially practical for indie developers and small teams.

items.title: LiveDemo
items.description: Open-source alternative to Storylane, Navattic, and Arcade
items.summary_zh: LiveDemo 是一个开源的互动演示平台，可以用来替代 Storylane、Navattic 和 Arcade 这类付费工具。它让你轻松创建产品交互演示、模拟试用和产品导览，所有代码都透明可控。对于 SaaS 公司和产品团队来说，LiveDemo 意味着不再被供应商锁定，可以按照自己的需求定制演示体验，同时节省许可费用。开源社区也能参与改进，让演示工具变得更灵活。
items.summary_en: LiveDemo is an open-source interactive demo platform designed as a free alternative to paid tools like Storylane, Navattic, and Arcade. It lets you create product tours, simulated walkthroughs, and interactive demos with full code transparency and control. For SaaS companies and product teams, LiveDemo means no vendor lock-in, the ability to tailor demo experiences exactly to their needs, and significant cost savings on licensing. The open-source community can also contribute improvements, making it a more flexible and evolving solution for showcasing software products.

items.title: Codex Micro
items.description: Tactile controls for your Codex agents
items.summary_zh: Codex Micro 是一款为 Codex 智能体提供触觉控制的外设，它通过物理旋钮、按钮和滑块让你直接操控 AI 代理的行为，比如调整参数、暂停任务或切换模式。对于经常与 AI 代理打交道的开发者和重度用户来说，这种实体交互方式比鼠标键盘更直观高效，尤其适合需要实时微调 AI 行为的场景，比如模型训练监控或自动化流程控制。它把抽象的数字控制变成了指尖的物理反馈。
items.summary_en: Codex Micro brings tactile controls to AI agents with physical knobs, buttons, and sliders that let you directly tweak agent behaviors—adjusting parameters, pausing tasks, or switching modes—without digging into code. For developers and power users who work with AI agents daily, this hardware interface offers a more intuitive and efficient way to manage real-time adjustments than traditional mouse-and-keyboard interactions. It's especially handy in scenarios like model training monitoring or automation flow control where quick, precise tweaks are needed. Codex Micro turns abstract digital control into satisfying physical feedback.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

items.title: 停更的这一年，All In AI、陪媳妇生娃、还考了个研
items.description: 停更的这一年，All In AI、陪媳妇生娃、还考了个研 打开掘金 App，看了一眼自己的最近更新——停在了整整一年前。 不是不想写，是这一年确实被塞得太满了。如果非要用几个关键词来概括，那就是： A
items.summary_zh: 一位掘金作者停更一年后回归，分享了这段时间的密集经历：全力投入 AI 领域、陪伴妻子生娃、还抽空考了个研。文章以第一人称讲述了如何平衡工作、家庭与个人提升，展现了技术人在生活重大节点上的真实抉择。对面临类似境遇的读者来说，这是一个关于如何在巨大压力下仍坚持成长的真实故事。
items.summary_en: A Juejin author returns after a year-long hiatus, recounting a whirlwind period of diving headfirst into AI, supporting his wife through childbirth, and even squeezing in graduate school exams. Through first-person narration, he shares how he balanced career, family, and personal growth, offering a relatable and inspiring tale for developers navigating life’s major milestones while striving to keep improving.

items.title: 2026编程圈很火的10个Skills
items.description: 前言 最近编程圈最火的一个词，非 Skills 莫属。 不是指程序员的技术能力，而是指 AI 编程助手的“技能包” 。 一套让 AI 从“随缘写代码”变成“按流程交付”的标准化工作流模块。 今天这篇文
items.summary_zh: 2026 年编程圈热议的 10 个 Skills 并非指程序员的技术能力，而是 AI 编程助手的“技能包”——一套标准化工作流模块，让 AI 从随缘写代码变为按流程交付。这些技能包覆盖代码审查、测试生成、文档编写等环节，旨在提升开发效率和代码质量。对正在探索 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人开发者而言，掌握这些技能包将成为提高生产力的关键。
items.summary_en: The 10 hottest Skills in programming circles for 2026 refer not to developers' own abilities but to standardized workflow modules for AI coding assistants. These skill packages transform AI from random code generation to structured delivery, covering code review, test generation, documentation, and more. For teams and individual developers exploring AI-assisted programming, mastering these skills is becoming essential for boosting productivity and code quality.

items.title: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义”
items.description: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义” 一、谷歌憋了两个月的王牌，专攻前端 2026 年 7 月，全网被 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的泄露刷屏了。 谷歌在 I/O 大会上
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讨论了一个大胆的预测：到2026年7月，随着谷歌Gemini 3.5 Pro等AI能力的爆发，前后端开发的角色正在经历根本性重塑。AI不仅能自动生成 UI 代码，还能直接处理业务逻辑，传统的“前端”与“后端”分工可能逐渐消失。文章以谷歌泄露的新模型为引子，探讨了开发者如何在这种变革中找到新定位，以及“全栈”一词本身可能被重新定义。
items.summary_en: This provocative article argues that by July 2026, breakthroughs like Google's leaked Gemini 3.5 Pro will erase the traditional boundary between frontend and backend development. AI capable of generating both UI and business logic could make today's specialized roles obsolete, forcing developers to rethink their skill sets. It asks what 'full-stack' means when machines handle the stack, and explores how coders can adapt to a world where the very concept of frontend is being redefined.

items.title: 没写一行代码！我用 ChatGPT 5.6 (Sol) 做了一个智慧充电站 3D 大屏
items.description: 先说结论。 从设计稿到能在浏览器里打开、点击充电桩弹出状态面板的 3D 可视化大屏，我没有写任何一行代码，没有在 Blender 里手动拖过一次控件，也没有切过一张图。 整条链路交给了 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 作者分享了自己用 ChatGPT 5.6（代号 Sol）从零构建智慧充电站 3D 可视化大屏的体验。整个过程没写一行代码，没碰任何设计软件——设计师只需给出草图，AI 就能生成可在浏览器中交互的 3D 场景，点击充电桩还会弹出状态面板。这展示了大模型在 UI 生成和 3D 场景构建上的惊人能力，尤其适合不擅长编码的产品经理或设计师，让他们快速验证创意。
items.summary_en: The author recounts building a 3D smart charging station dashboard using ChatGPT 5.6 (codenamed Sol) without writing a single line of code. Starting from hand-drawn sketches, the AI generated an interactive 3D scene with clickable charging piles and status panels, all running in a browser. This demonstrates how large language models are lowering the barrier for non-programmers—especially product managers and designers—to prototype and visualize complex interactive experiences quickly.

items.title: DeepSeek V4 正式版即将发布，有哪些值得关注的亮点？
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek V4 正式版的即将发布引发了广泛关注，作为国产大模型的重要迭代，它预计在推理能力、多模态理解和长文本处理上会有显著提升。业界普遍期待它能缩小甚至超越 GPT-4 在某些任务上的表现，同时保持低成本和高效率的优势。对于 AI 研究者和应用开发者来说，V4 可能带来更稳定的 API 服务和更丰富的生态工具，进一步推动 AI 应用落地。这次更新不仅关乎技术参数，更可能影响未来国产大模型的格局。
items.summary_en: The upcoming official release of DeepSeek V4 has generated significant buzz as a major iteration of China's leading large language model. Expected improvements include stronger reasoning abilities, better multimodal understanding, and enhanced long-context processing. Many in the industry hope it will close the gap with or even surpass GPT-4 on certain benchmarks while maintaining DeepSeek's signature cost-efficiency. For AI researchers and application developers, V4 could offer more stable APIs and a richer ecosystem of tools, further accelerating real-world AI deployment. This update isn't just about technical specs—it may reshape the competitive landscape for domestic large models.

items.title: 金标联盟宣布小米、 OPPO 、 vivo 、荣耀将统一「碰一碰」及运存管理标准，安卓生态能否告别各自为战？
items.summary_zh: 金标联盟由小米、OPPO、vivo、荣耀等主流手机厂商发起，宣布将统一“碰一碰”（近场通信）和运存管理标准，这意味着安卓碎片化问题有望迎来关键破局。过去不同品牌间碰一碰功能互不兼容，运存管理也各有规则，导致用户换机或使用跨品牌配件时体验割裂。如今四大厂商联手制定统一规范，让应用和硬件适配不再各自为战，降低开发者成本的同时也提升了普通用户的日常使用流畅度。对于想享受无缝安卓生态的用户来说，这无疑是值得期待的进步。
items.summary_en: The Gold Standard Alliance, comprising Xiaomi, OPPO, vivo, and Honor, has announced plans to unify the 'tap-to-share' (NFC) and RAM management standards across their devices. This move directly tackles the long-standing fragmentation in the Android ecosystem, where different brands implemented incompatible NFC protocols and memory optimization policies. By establishing a common standard, the alliance aims to make cross-brand file transfers and app behavior more predictable and seamless. Developers will benefit from reduced fragmentation, while end users—especially those juggling multiple devices or switching brands—can expect a smoother, more consistent experience. Although the initiative is still in early stages, it signals a rare cooperative effort among Chinese smartphone giants to solve a core Android pain point.

items.title: 参加 2026 世界人工智能大会 (WAIC) 是一种怎样的体验？
items.summary_zh: 2026年世界人工智能大会（WAIC）在上海浦江两岸盛大举行，吸引全球顶尖AI科学家、企业家和创业者齐聚一堂。参会者体验了从具身机器人、生成式AI到AI for Science的最前沿成果，现场不仅有能跑会跳的机器人，还有实时交互的“数字人”助手。大会最引人注目的是多项大模型新突破的集中展示，以及各行业落地案例，如AI医疗诊断和自动驾驶的升级方案。对于从业者而言，这不仅是一场技术盛宴，更是洞察未来趋势、寻找合作机会的绝佳窗口；普通观众则能感受到AI如何悄然渗透日常生活的方方面面。
items.summary_en: The 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) in Shanghai was a dazzling showcase of the latest breakthroughs in AI, drawing leading researchers, entrepreneurs, and tech enthusiasts from around the world. Attendees were treated to live demonstrations of humanoid robots, generative AI systems creating art and code on the fly, and AI-driven scientific discovery tools. The event's highlight was the debut of several advanced large language models with improved reasoning and multimodal capabilities, alongside practical applications in healthcare, autonomous driving, and digital assistants. For industry insiders, WAIC served as both a knowledge injection and a networking goldmine; for casual visitors, it offered a tangible glimpse of how AI is reshaping work and life.

items.title: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests
items.author: kirushik
items.summary_zh: Claude Code被发现会在发出的请求中嵌入隐写术标记，这一做法引发了广泛讨论。这些标记以不易察觉的方式隐藏在正常数据流里，可能用于追溯请求来源、防止篡改或进行版权声明。虽然隐写本身并非恶意，但它意味着用户与AI交互时可能被无感追踪，从而引发隐私和透明度方面的担忧。对于注重数据隐蔽性和控制权的开发者来说，这无疑是个需要警惕的新动向。
items.summary_en: Claude Code has been discovered to embed steganographic marks within its outgoing requests, a technique that hides data in plain sight. These marks can trace the origin of requests, prevent tampering, or assert copyright. While not inherently malicious, the practice raises privacy and transparency concerns, as users may be unknowingly tracked during AI interactions. For developers who value data sovereignty and fine-grained control, this revelation signals a need to scrutinize how AI tools handle metadata beyond the obvious outputs.

items.title: Steam Machine launches today
items.author: theschwa
items.summary_zh: Valve今日正式发布了Steam Machine，这是一款专为客厅游戏场景设计的游戏主机，运行SteamOS系统。它允许玩家在电视上流畅运行PC游戏，并支持流式传输和多种控制器。此次发布标志着Valve试图打破主机市场格局，将PC游戏的开放生态带入客厅。对于游戏玩家而言，这意味着更丰富的游戏选择、更低的硬件门槛，以及跨平台存档和社交功能的便利。
items.summary_en: Valve today officially launched the Steam Machine, a gaming console designed for the living room running SteamOS. It lets players smoothly play PC games on TV, supports streaming and various controllers. This launch marks Valve's attempt to disrupt the console market by bringing the open ecosystem of PC gaming into the living room. For gamers, it means more game choices, lower hardware barriers, and the convenience of cross-platform saves and social features.

items.title: Android Developer Verification: Threat masquerading as protection
items.author: drewfax
items.summary_zh: 一位安全研究员揭露了 Android 开发者验证流程中存在的严重安全隐患：这一本意是保护开发者账户的机制，反而可能被攻击者利用来冒充合法开发者。通过分析验证逻辑中的漏洞，攻击者可以绕过程序窃取身份或发布恶意应用。这相当于把保护门禁变成了入侵的梯子。对于 Android 生态中的所有开发者而言，这个问题值得高度警惕，因为它动摇了整个应用签名和身份信任体系的基础。
items.summary_en: A security researcher reveals that Android's Developer Verification process—designed to protect developers—can be exploited by attackers to impersonate legitimate developers. By analyzing flaws in the verification logic, adversaries can bypass protections, steal identities, or distribute malicious apps under trusted names. This turns a protective gate into an entry point for intrusion. The finding undermines the trust foundation of Android's app signing and identity system, making it a critical concern for every developer in the ecosystem.

items.title: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
items.author: verditelabs
items.summary_zh: 科学家们首次完整地阅读了一卷被维苏威火山喷发碳化的赫库兰尼姆古卷，这卷在公元79年埋藏至今的莎草纸文献通过先进成像技术和人工智能得到了成功解读。团队利用高分辨率扫描和机器学习模型破译了被碳化的文字，揭示了古希腊哲学和文学的新内容。这项突破不仅为历史研究打开了一扇通往古代世界的新窗户，也验证了非侵入式技术对脆弱文物的保护价值。对于考古学家、古典学者以及所有对文明传承感兴趣的人来说，这是一个激动人心的里程碑。
items.summary_en: For the first time, researchers have fully read a Herculaneum scroll that was carbonized by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD. Using advanced X-ray imaging and machine learning, they deciphered the charred papyrus, unearthing new passages of ancient Greek philosophy and literature. This achievement solves a centuries-old puzzle—these scrolls were long considered too fragile to unroll. The breakthrough not only enriches our understanding of antiquity but also demonstrates a powerful, non-invasive method for studying other delicate artifacts. Archaeologists, classicists, and anyone fascinated by lost knowledge will find this a monumental leap forward.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI, accuses ex-employees of stealing trade secrets
items.author: stock_toaster
items.summary_zh: 苹果公司近日对OpenAI提起民事诉讼，指控多名前员工在离职时窃取了与人工智能研发相关的商业机密。这些员工据称带走了内部技术文档和核心算法，并可能用于竞争项目。这起诉讼不仅反映了硅谷两大科技巨头在人才和知识产权上的激烈争夺，也凸显了AI领域日益敏感的技术保密问题。对于科技行业观察者而言，这场法律战的结果或许会重塑企业防范员工跳槽时的保密协议设计。
items.summary_en: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging that several former employees stole trade secrets related to artificial intelligence research. The complaint claims these workers took proprietary technical documents and core algorithms before leaving for positions that could benefit competing projects. This legal battle underscores the fierce competition for talent and intellectual property between two Silicon Valley giants, and highlights the growing sensitivity of technology secrecy in the AI industry. For tech observers, the outcome may influence how companies craft confidentiality agreements to guard against employee poaching.

items.title: EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0
items.author: rapnie
items.summary_zh: 欧盟议会通过了备受争议的Chat Control 1.0法案，要求数字平台扫描并报告涉及儿童性虐待材料的私密通信内容。这项立法引发了隐私与安全之间的激烈辩论，支持者认为它有助于保护儿童，而反对者警告这可能破坏端到端加密并开创大规模监控的先例。对于关注数字权利和隐私保护的群体来说，这是一个需要密切关注的发展。
items.summary_en: The European Parliament has approved the controversial Chat Control 1.0 regulation, requiring digital platforms to scan private communications for child sexual abuse material. The law sparks intense debate between child safety advocates and privacy defenders, who warn it undermines end-to-end encryption and sets a precedent for mass surveillance. Anyone concerned about digital rights and encryption should pay close attention to this development.

items.title: GPT-5.6
items.author: logickkk1
items.summary_zh: 关于GPT-5.6的传闻在开发者社区悄然升温，据称这是OpenAI内部测试的新一代模型，在推理效率和长文本处理上有显著提升。尽管官方未确认，但泄露的基准测试显示其在复杂编程和数学任务上超越了现有版本。如果属实，这将意味着AI模型在实用性和响应速度上迈入新台阶，对依赖语言模型的开发者和企业影响深远。
items.summary_en: Rumors about GPT-5.6, an alleged internal iteration from OpenAI, have sparked excitement in the developer community. Leaked benchmarks suggest it offers substantial improvements in reasoning efficiency and long-context handling, outperforming current models on complex coding and math tasks. While OpenAI hasn't confirmed the release, the speculation points to a possible leap in practical AI utility, making responses faster and more accurate. For developers and businesses relying on language models, even incremental upgrades can translate into better user experiences and lower latency. This potential release underscores the rapid pace of AI advancement.

items.title: Decoding the obfuscated bash script on a Uniqlo t-shirt
items.author: speerer
items.summary_zh: 一位技术爱好者解析了优衣库T恤上印制的混淆bash脚本，发现它实际上是一个恶作剧程序，通过复杂的字符串操作和陷阱逻辑来隐藏其真实功能。这篇分析展示了逆向工程乐趣，也提醒大家即使看似无害的代码也可能暗藏玄机。对于安全研究人员和编程爱好者来说，这是一次趣味与技术并重的解谜之旅。
items.summary_en: A tech enthusiast meticulously dissected an obfuscated bash script printed on a Uniqlo t-shirt, revealing it to be a playful prank program designed to confuse casual observers. The script uses intricate string manipulations and trap commands to mask its true purpose, which is simply to echo a message. This analysis highlights the fun side of reverse engineering and serves as a reminder that even innocuous-looking code can contain hidden complexity. It's a delightful read for security researchers and programming hobbyists who enjoy a good puzzle.

items.title: Zig Creator Calls Spade a Spade, Anthropic Blows Smoke
items.author: crowdhailer
items.summary_zh: Zig语言的创始人近日直言不讳地批评了人工智能公司Anthropic，指责其营销宣传充斥着虚假和夸大的内容。他在社交媒体上毫不留情地指出，Anthropic所谓的“安全、负责任”的AI不过是烟雾弹，实际行为与其承诺严重不符。这场公开争执在开发者社区引发热议，许多人赞赏他的坦率，认为这揭示了AI行业普遍存在的过度包装问题。事件提醒我们，技术的真正价值取决于透明度和诚实，而非华丽的辞藻。
items.summary_en: The creator of the Zig programming language openly criticized AI company Anthropic for what he called misleading marketing and exaggerated claims. In a blunt online post, he accused Anthropic of blowing smoke about its safety and responsibility commitments while failing to deliver on those promises. The exchange has stirred significant discussion in the developer community, with many applauding his candor and seeing it as a reflection of broader issues in the AI industry where hype often overshadows substance. This moment underscores the importance of transparency and honesty in technology, reminding us that real progress depends on truth, not rhetoric.
